name: Monarq WBTC Market Neutral Yield
description: Monarq WBTC Market Neutral Yield vault captures BTC-denominated yield by allocating across lending protocols, fixed-rate DeFi positions, and tokenized real-world assets. All positions are dynamically managed with continuous risk monitoring and rebalancing.
assetManagerDescription: Monarq Asset Management is an institutional digital asset manager with deep expertise in quantitative trading and risk management. The team brings decades of experience from leading firms including UBS, Merrill Lynch, Tower Research, and BlockTower, managing over $700M in assets with a proven track record of consistent, risk-adjusted returns.

name: USDC Investment Grade Diversified Income
description: The USDC Investment Grade Diversified Income strategy combines active management with a predominantly investment grade bias, while selectively incorporating higher-yielding opportunities. Liquidity remains a central objective, although the strategy may accept limited exposure to moderately less liquid positions where appropriately compensated. The focus is on optimising risk-adjusted returns through diversified, quality-oriented digital income sources.
assetManagerDescription: CoinShares is a pioneering digital asset investment firm founded in 2014. The company launched the first regulated Bitcoin fund and the first open-ended crypto ETP in Europe. As the market leader with ~45% share of European crypto ETP assets, CoinShares combines deep institutional expertise with a decade-long track record in regulated digital asset management.

name: USDC High Yield Diversified Income
description: The USDC High Yield Diversified Income strategy targets enhanced income through broader acceptance of credit, collateral and liquidity risk. The portfolio diversifies across higher-yielding digital exposures, including non-investment grade and selectively less liquid opportunities, with active credit and collateral assessment. Investors should expect higher return potential accompanied by greater volatility and less liquidity relative to more defensive strategies.
assetManagerDescription: CoinShares is a pioneering digital asset investment firm founded in 2014. The company launched the first regulated Bitcoin fund and the first open-ended crypto ETP in Europe. As the market leader with ~45% share of European crypto ETP assets, CoinShares combines deep institutional expertise with a decade-long track record in regulated digital asset management.
